subject: Re: your request
body:
Hello,

We have looked at the authentication logs for your account and can see the MFA loop you reported. Please close and reopen your authenticator app to resync the time, then try logging in again from a fresh browser window. If the issue persists, we can reset your MFA device.

Thanks,
Monk Support
